text: polos vesilevanos vetimotios el-qehilat hatesaloniqim belohim avinu uvaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
chesed lakhem veshalom meet elohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
chayavim anachenu lehodot tamid lelohim 'aleykhem achay karauy ki emunatekhem gadela meod veraba ahavat kulekhem ish lere'ehu
'ad shenitehalel bakhem biqehilot elohim 'al-savelanutekhem ve'al-emunatekhem bekhal-haredifot uvekhal-halachats asher sevaletem
leot tsideqat mishepat elohim lema'an timatseu reuyim lemalekhut haelohim asher ba'avurah te'unu
baasher tsadiq hu haelohim ligemol lachats lelochatseykhem
velakhem hanilechatsim revacha 'imanu yachad behigalot haadon yeshu'a min-hashamayim 'im-maleakhey 'uzo
beesh leehava lehashiv naqam laasher lo-yade'u et-haelohim velo shame'u livesorat adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher yiseu mishepatam avedan 'olam meet peney haadon umehadar geono
bevoo bayom hahu lehikaved biqedshayv ulehitepale bekhal-hamaaminim ki heemanetem le'edutenu aleykhem
lazot gam-nitepalel ba'adekhem tamid asher yiten etekhem eloheynu reuyim lemah-sheatem meqoraim vimale ve'oz kal-chefetsekhem batov vekhal-ma'ase emunatekhem
lema'an yikaved bakhem shem yeshu'a adoneynu veatem tikavedu vo 'al-pi chesed eloheynu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
vehinenu mevaqeshim mikem echay 'al-odot biat adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha vaasifatenu elayv
asher lo-titaref da'etekhem piteom vaasher lo tibahelu lo verucha velo vedibur velo veigeret keilu shelucha meitanu lemor higi'a yom yeho
al-yate'e etekhem ish beshum ofen ki lo-yavo beterem yiheye varishona hamered venigela ish hachataa ben-haavadon
hamiteqomem vehamiteromem 'al-kal-haniqera el o 'avoda ki gam-yeshev beheykhal haelohim kelohim umaree et-'atsemo ki elohim hu
halo tizekeru ki-ve'od heyoti itekhem ele dibareti aleykhem
ve'ata yeda'etem et asher yimena'ehu milehigalot be'ito
ki sod haresha' kevar hechela fe'ulato raq sheyusar mitavekh hamone'a 'ad-ko
veaz yigale harasha' asher yemitenu haadon berucha sefatayv veyashebitenu behofa'at biato
et asher yavo kefi pe'ulat hasatan berav-kocha uveotot uvemofetey shaqer
uvekhal-miremat aven baovedim tachat asher lo qibelu et-ahavat haemet lehivashe'a
uva'avur zot yeshalach lahem haelohim maduchey shave lehaamin bashaqer
lema'an yidonu kal-asher lo-heeminu vaemet veratsu ba'avela
aval anachenu chayavim lehodot tamid lelohim ba'avurekhem achay chavivey haadon asher mibatechila bachar bakhem haelohim lishu'a biqedushat harucha uveemunat haemet
lazot qara etekhem bivesoratenu lenachalat kevod adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
lakhen achay 'imedu vehachaziqu vaqabalot asher lumadetem im bidevarenu im beigaretenu
vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha veloheynu avinu asher ahav otanu vayiten-lanu vechasedo nechamat 'olam vetiqeva tova
hu yenachem et-levavekhem vikhonen etekhem bekhal-davar uma'ase tov
ve'od achay hitepalalu va'adenu asher yaruts devar yeho veyikaved kehikavedo veqirebekhem
vaasher ninatsel min-haanashim hato'im vehara'im ki lo lekhal-adam haemuna
aval neeman hu haadon asher yechazeq etekhem veyishemarekhem min-hara'
vaanachenu betuchim 'aleykhem baadoneynu she'osim atem kemitsevatenu vegam-tosifu la'asot
vehaadon hu yeyasher et-levavekhem leahavat haelohim ulesavelanut hamashicha
vehinenu metsavim etekhem achim beshem adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha asher tibadelu mikal-ach me'aqesh derakhayv veeynenu mitehalekh 'al-pi haqabala asher qibel meitanu
halo atem yeda'etem shetserikhim atem lehitehalekh kamonu ki lo-he'evinu et-darekenu betokhakhem
gam lo-akhalenu lechem ish chinam ki be'amal utelaa layela veyomam yaga'enu levileti heyot leish mikem lemasa
lo mipeney sheeyn-lanu hareshut hazot ki im-latet otanu lakhem lemofet lalekhet be'iqevoteynu
ki gam-biheyotenu etselekhem tsivinu etekhem lemor asher lo yiretse la'asot gam-lo yokhel
ki shama'enu sheyesh bakhem me'aqeshim arechotam veeynam 'osim davar umevalim yemeyhem bahavalim
vaanashim kaele netsave otam venazehirem baadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha la'avod benachat lema'an yokhelu et-lachemam mishelahem
veatem echay al-titerapu ba'asot hatov
veim lo-yishema' ish el-devarenu baigeret hazot oto tireshemu lakhem veal-tite'aravu 'imo lema'an yevosh
akh lo-kheoyev tacheshevuhu ki im-tokhichuhu keach
vehu vaadon hashalom hu yiten lakhem hashalom tamid uvekhal-panim yehi haadon 'im-kulekhem
shoel lishelomekhem bikhetav yadi ani folos vehi haot bekhal-haigerot ken anokhi khotev
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu 'im-kulekhem ﻿
